messages.content:
Which of the following is a right guaranteed by the 6th Amendment? A. Free Speech
B. Open Press
C. Right to Vote
D. Speedy Trial
D. Speedy Trial

Which amendment banned the production, sale, and distribution of liquor in the United States? A. 17th Amendment
B. 20th Amendment
C. 16th Amendment
D. 18th Amendment
D. 18th Amendment

"New Jersey vs. TLO" set up schools to have the power to search students, and their belongings, if they have which of the following? A. An active search warrant by the police.
B. Probable cause and evidence proving guilt.
C. Reasonable suspicion of a student's activities in school.
C. Reasonable suspicion of a student's activities in school.

In 1896 racial segregation was considered which of the following in public places? A. unconstitutional
B. legal
C. morally wrong
B. legal

The Brown case overturned what court case from 1896? A. Miranda vs. Arizona
B. Roe vs. Wade
C. Plessy vs. Ferguson
C. Plessy vs. Ferguson

Which topic was at the heart of the Gideon v. Wainwright case? A. Right of the accused to a quick and speedy trial.
B. Right of the accused to have a lawyer.
C. Right of the accused to remain silent.
B. Right of the accused to have a lawyer.

Which of the following was established by the Miranda v. Arizona case? A. The right to a trial by jury.
B. The right to bear arms.
C. All defendants must be informed of their rights.
D. No illegal search and seizure.
C. All defendants must be informed of their rights.

Which of the following is true on election day? A. You may vote at any polling location you would like.
3. You must vote at your designated polling ocation.
C. There are no specific requirements voters must follow.
B. You must vote at your designated polling location.

Which amendment established 18 as the minimum age to vote in the United States? A. 15th Amendment
B. 19th Amendment
C. 26th Amendment
C. 26th Amendment

What is the very FIRST step for a candidate who wants to be President?
A. primary season
B. declaration of candidacy
C. general election
B. declaration of candidacy

Which presidential candidate was the first to record and present speeches on Youtube? A. Donald Trump
B. George W. Bush
C. Barack Obama
C. Barack Obama

Which of the following is NOT an example of a regressive tax? A. Food
B. Gas
C. Social security
C. Social security

How often are presidential elections held in the United States? A. Every six years
B. Every four years
C. Every two years
B. Every four years

What is required to be on an ad created by a personal interest group? A. The name of the candidate.
B. The name of the political party.
C. The name of the PAC.
C. The name of the PAC.
